# `draw.timeCycles`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `other`
> **Wire kind:** `time-cycles`

Draw concentric semicircles measuring time cycles between two world
anchors `[centre, edge]`. The renderer projects upper-half arcs
centred at the midpoint of the two anchors at the `from.price`
baseline; arcs tile across the viewport at multiples of the arc
diameter.

## Anchors

`a`, `b` — two `WorldPoint`s `(from, to)`

Anchor count: 2.

## Signature

```ts
function timeCycles(a: WorldPoint, b: WorldPoint, opts?: LineDrawStyle): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.timeCycles(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.timeCycles demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.timeCycles(
                { time: bar.time, price: bar.close },
                { time: bar.time + 60_000, price: bar.close },
                { color: "#0ea5e9" },
            );
        },
    });
```
